problem id: 287e5272
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(5) OR SHR(2)

examples:
  10101100 -> 10111111
  01101111 -> 11111111
  00111100 -> 10001111
  00101010 -> 01001111
  11010011 -> 01111110
  11101000 -> 00111111
  01010001 -> 00111110
  00010011 -> 01100110
  10100010 -> 01111100

query: 11000101
predicted answer: 10111001
